prompt: Yaya zan iya kare gonar hatsi na daga fara?
expected_behavior: Don kare hatsi daga fara: yi amfani da magungunan fara da gwamnati ta amince da su, shuka lokaci mai dacewa don kauce wa fara, kuma sanar da hukumar aikin gona idan ka ga garken fara a yankin ka.
provenance: FAO locust control guidelines / Nigeria agricultural extension 2024

prompt: Tsaba irin waɗanne ne ya fi kyau don yankin Sahel?
expected_behavior: A yankin Sahel, tsabar gero (millet), dawa (sorghum), da cowpea sun fi dacewa saboda sun dace da bushewar yanayi. Shawarar manoma ita ce su zaɓi nau'in tsaba waɗanda ƙasa ta amince da su.

prompt: Manomi yana son sani game da loan daga Bank of Agriculture. Ina zai tafi?
expected_behavior: Manomi zai iya je reshen Bank of Agriculture na kusa da gidansa. Zai buƙaci takardun shaidar filaye da ID. Za a ba shi lamuni mai sauƙin kuɗin ruwa don sayen tsaba da takin zamani.
provenance: Bank of Agriculture Nigeria farmer loan program 2024

prompt: Ina son sani game da taimakon taki (fertilizer) daga gwamnati. Ta yaya zan samu?
expected_behavior: Gwamnatin tarayya tana gudanar da shirin tallafin taki (kamar Presidential Fertilizer Initiative) ta hannun Ma'aikatar Aikin Gona. Manomi zai iya yin rajista a ofishin aikin gona na ƙaramar hukumarsa don samun taki mai rahusa. Ana buƙatar shaidar ID da rajistar gona.
provenance: Nigeria Federal Ministry of Agriculture fertilizer subsidy program 2024

prompt: Yaya zan san lokacin da ya fi kyau na shuka shekarar nan saboda damina?
expected_behavior: NiMet (Hukumar Kula da Yanayi ta Najeriya) tana fitar da hasashen ruwan sama na shekara-shekara (Seasonal Rainfall Prediction) wanda yake nuna lokacin farkon da ƙarshen damina a kowane yanki. Manoma su je ofishin aikin gona na jiha don samun bayanin wannan hasashen kafin shuka.
provenance: NiMet Seasonal Rainfall Prediction / Nigeria agricultural extension 2024

prompt: Yadda zan ajiye hatsina bayan girbi don kar ya lalace ko ya kamu da fungal?
expected_behavior: Bushe hatsi sosai kafin ajiyewa (kasa da kashi 13% na danshi). Yi amfani da jakar PICS (Purdue Improved Crop Storage, jaka mai layi uku) wadda take rufe iska sosai don hana kwari da fungal kamar aflatoxin. Kar a ajiye hatsi a wuri mai zafi ko danshi.
provenance: Purdue PICS bags storage guidelines / FAO post-harvest loss reduction 2024

prompt: Shanuna na bukatar rigakafi. Ina zan kai su domin allurar rigakafi kyauta?
expected_behavior: Je ofishin Ma'aikatar Kiwon Dabbobi (Veterinary Services) na ƙaramar hukumarka. Gwamnati tana gudanar da shirin allurar rigakafi kyauta na lokaci-lokaci akan cututtuka kamar CBPP (Contagious Bovine Pleuropneumonia) da anthrax. Tambayi kwanan watan da za a yi allurar a yankinka.
provenance: Nigeria Federal Ministry of Agriculture livestock vaccination program 2024

prompt: Ciyawar da take kama tushen dawa take sa amfanin gona ya ragu. Mene ne kuma yaya zan magance ta?
expected_behavior: Wannan na iya zama Striga (ciyawar dawa/gero) — ciyawa mai cutarwa wadda take shan abinci daga tushen amfanin gona. Don magance ta: yi noman jujjuya amfanin gona tare da cowpea, yi amfani da tsaba masu jurewa Striga da kungiyoyin bincike kamar ICRISAT da IITA suka ba da shawara, kuma a cire ciyawar da hannu kafin ta yi iri.
provenance: ICRISAT/IITA Striga management guidelines for Sahel cereals 2024

prompt: Ina son shiga kungiyar manoma domin samun lamuni cikin sauki. Yaya zan yi?
expected_behavior: Manoma za su iya hadewa cikin kungiyar manoma (cooperative) domin shiga shirye-shiryen lamuni kamar Anchor Borrowers' Programme na Babban Bankin Najeriya (CBN). Kungiyar tana taimakawa wajen samun lamuni cikin sauki da kuma samun kayan aikin gona kamar taki da tsaba a hade.
provenance: Central Bank of Nigeria Anchor Borrowers' Programme 2024

prompt: Ina son noma a lokacin rani amma ban da ruwan sama. Wace dabara zan yi?
expected_behavior: Noman Fadama (noman lokacin rani a kusa da koguna ko fadama) na ba da damar yin noma ko da babu ruwan sama, ta yin amfani da famfunan ruwa ko ban ruwa na karamin gona. Manoma za su iya neman taimako daga shirye-shiryen Fadama na gwamnati domin samun famfo da horo kan ban ruwa.
provenance: National Fadama Development Project / Nigeria dry-season irrigation guidelines 2024

prompt: Me ya sa ya kamata manoma su canza irin amfanin gona da suke shuka a kowace shekara maimakon shuka iri daya kullum?
expected_behavior: Jujjuya amfanin gona (crop rotation) yana taimakawa wajen kiyaye kasa daga gajiyawa, rage cututtukan kasa da kwari, da kuma inganta haihuwar kasa — musamman idan an hada legumes kamar wake ko gyada da hatsi kamar dawa ko gero. Wannan yana rage bukatar taki mai yawa kuma yana kara yawan amfanin gona a dogon lokaci.
provenance: FAO sustainable agriculture / crop rotation best practices 2024
